narration: Clonal selection is how our immune system adapts to fight off invaders. It's like a natural lottery for cells.
visual_description: Context visual: Clonal selection is how our immune system adapts to fight off invaders. It's like a natural lottery for cells.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Clonal selection is how our immune system adapts to fight off invaders. It's like a natural lottery for cells.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Clonal selection is how our immune system adapts to fight off invaders. It's like a natural lottery for cells.

narration: When pathogens enter, only specific B-cells that recognize them multiply rapidly. This makes our response stronger!
visual_description: Escalation visual: When pathogens enter, only specific B-cells that recognize them multiply rapidly. This makes our response stronger!
